AddonList.description: AddonList defines the slice of keys to use for addons.

label.title: Label
label.description: Useful identifier, such as home, work, etc.

po_box.title: Post Office Box
po_box.description: Box number or code for the post office box located at the address.

num.title: Number
num.description: House or building number in the street.

locality.title: Locality
locality.description: Name of a village, town, district, or city, typically inside a region.

region.title: Region
region.description: Name of a city, province, county, or state, inside a country.

state.title: State
state.description: State or province code for countries that require it.

coords.title: Coordinates
coords.description: When the postal address is not sufficient, coordinates help locate the address more precisely.

meta.title: Meta
meta.description: Any additional semi-structure details about the address.

Address.description: Address defines a globally acceptable set of attributes that describes a postal or fiscal address.

anyOf.title: Any
anyOf.description: Any method available, no preference.

anyOf.title: Card
anyOf.description: Payment card.

anyOf.title: Credit Transfer
anyOf.description: Sender initiated bank or wire transfer.

anyOf.title: SEPA Credit Transfer
anyOf.description: Sender initiated bank or wire transfer via SEPA.

anyOf.title: Debit Transfer
anyOf.description: Receiver initiated bank or wire transfer.

anyOf.title: Cash
anyOf.description: Cash in hand.

anyOf.title: Cheque
anyOf.description: Cheque from bank.

anyOf.title: Draft
anyOf.description: Bankers Draft or Bank Cheque.

anyOf.title: Direct Debit
anyOf.description: Direct debit from the customers bank account.

anyOf.title: SEPA Direct Debit
anyOf.description: Direct debit from the customers bank account via SEPA.

anyOf.title: Online
anyOf.description: Online or web payment.

anyOf.title: Promissory Note
anyOf.description: Promissory note contract.

anyOf.title: Netting
anyOf.description: Intercompany clearing or clearing between partners.

anyOf.title: Other
anyOf.description: Other or mutually defined means of payment.

key.title: Key
key.description: The payment means used to make the advance.

ref.title: Reference
ref.description: ID or reference for the advance.

grant.title: Grant
grant.description: If this "advance" payment has come from a public grant or subsidy, set this to true.

percent.title: Percent
percent.description:
Percentage of the total amount payable that was paid. Note that
multiple advances with percentages may lead to rounding errors,
especially when the total advances sums to 100%. We recommend only
including one advance with a percent value per document.

currency.title: Currency
currency.description: If different from the parent document's base currency.

card.title: Card
card.description: Details of the payment that was made via a credit or debit card.

credit_transfer.title: Credit Transfer
credit_transfer.description: Details about how the payment was made by credit (bank) transfer.

ext.title: Extensions
ext.description: Tax extensions required by tax regimes or addons.

meta.title: Meta
meta.description: Additional details useful for the parties involved.

Advance.description: Advance represents a single payment that has been made already, such as a deposit on an intent to purchase, or as credit from a previous invoice which was later corrected or cancelled.

Amount.title: Amount
Amount.description: Quantity with optional decimal places that determine accuracy.

key.title: Key
key.description: Key used to identify the attachment inside the document.

code.title: Code
code.description: Code used to identify the payload of the attachment.

name.title: Name
name.description: Filename of the attachment, will override name retrieved from URL.

description.title: Description
description.description:
Details of why the attachment is being included and details on
what it contains.

url.title: URL
url.description: URL of where to find the attachment.

digest.title: Digest
digest.description:
Digest is used to verify the integrity of the attachment
when downloaded from the URL.

Attachment.description: An Attachment provides a structure to be used to attach documents inside a GOBL document, either as a reference via a URL, or directly as a base64 encoded string.

first6.title: First 6
first6.description: First 6 digits of the card's Primary Account Number (PAN).

last4.title: Last 4
last4.description: Last 4 digits of the card's Primary Account Number (PAN).

holder.title: Holder Name
holder.description: Name of the person whom the card belongs to.

Card.description: Card contains simplified card holder data as a reference for the customer.

CategoryTotal.description: CategoryTotal groups together all rates inside a given category.

i.title: Index
i.description: Line number inside the list of charges (calculated).

key.title: Key
key.description:
Key for grouping or identifying charges for tax purposes. A suggested list of
keys is provided, but these may be extended by the issuer.

code.title: Code
code.description: Code to used to refer to the this charge by the issuer

reason.title: Reason
reason.description: Text description as to why the charge was applied

base.title: Base
base.description:
Base represents the value used as a base for percent calculations instead
of the invoice's sum of lines.

percent.title: Percent
percent.description: Percentage to apply to the sum of all lines

amount.title: Amount
amount.description: Amount to apply (calculated if percent present)

taxes.title: Taxes
taxes.description: List of taxes to apply to the charge

ext.title: Extensions
ext.description: Extension codes that apply to the charge

Charge.description: Charge represents a surchange applied to the complete document independent from the individual lines.

Code.title: Code
Code.description:
Alphanumerical text identifier with upper-case letters and limits on using
special characters or whitespace to separate blocks.

cat.title: Category
cat.description: Tax category code from those available inside a region.

country.title: Country
country.description: Country code override when issuing with taxes applied from different countries.

key.description: Key helps determine the tax situation within the category.

rate.title: Rate
rate.description: Rate within a category and for a given key to apply.

percent.title: Percent
percent.description:
Percent defines the percentage set manually or determined from the
key. A nil percent implies that this tax combo is either exempt or not-subject.

surcharge.title: Surcharge
surcharge.description: Some countries require an additional surcharge (may be determined if key present).

ext.title: Extensions
ext.description: Local codes that apply for a given rate or percentage that need to be identified and validated.

Combo.description: Combo represents the tax combination of a category code and rate key.

geohash.title: Geohash
geohash.description: Single string coordinate based on geohash standard.

Coordinates.description: Coordinates describes an exact geographical location in the world.

bic.title: BIC
bic.description: Bank Identifier Code used for international transfers.

number.title: Number
number.description: Account number, if IBAN not available.

branch.title: Branch
branch.description: Bank office branch address, not normally required.

CreditTransfer.description: CreditTransfer contains fields that can be used for making payments via a bank transfer or wire.

Date.title: Date
Date.description: Civil date in simplified ISO format, like 2021-05-26

DateTime.title: Date Time
DateTime.description:
Civil date time in simplified ISO format with no time zone
nor location information, for example: 2021-05-26T13:45:00

receiver.title: Receiver
receiver.description: The party who will receive delivery of the goods defined in the invoice and is not responsible for taxes.

identities.title: Identities
identities.description:
Identities is used to define specific codes or IDs that may be used to
identify the delivery.

date.title: Date
date.description: When the goods should be expected.

period.title: Period
period.description: Period of time in which to expect delivery if a specific date is not available.

DeliveryDetails.description: DeliveryDetails covers the details of the destination for the products described in the invoice body.

alg.title: Algorithm
alg.description: Algorithm stores the algorithm key that was used to generate the value.

val.title: Value
val.description:
Value contains the Hexadecimal representation of the resulting hash
generated by the algorithm.

Digest.description: Digest defines a structure to hold a digest value including the algorithm used to generate it.

ref.title: Mandate Reference
ref.description: Unique identifier assigned by the payee for referencing the direct debit.

creditor.title: Creditor ID
creditor.description: Unique banking reference that identifies the payee or seller assigned by the bank.

account.title: Account
account.description: Account identifier to be debited by the direct debit.

DirectDebit.description: DirectDebit defines the data that will be used to make the direct debit.

i.title: Index
i.description: Line number inside the list of discounts (calculated)

anyOf.title: Bonus for works ahead of schedule

key.title: Key
key.description: Key for identifying the type of discount being applied.

code.title: Code
code.description: Code to used to refer to the this discount by the issuer

reason.title: Reason
reason.description: Text description as to why the discount was applied

base.title: Base
base.description:
Base represents the value used as a base for percent calculations instead
of the invoice's sum of lines.

percent.title: Percent
percent.description: Percentage to apply to the base or invoice's sum.

amount.title: Amount
amount.description: Amount to apply (calculated if percent present).

taxes.title: Taxes
taxes.description: List of taxes to apply to the discount

ext.title: Extensions
ext.description: Extension codes that apply to the discount

Discount.description: Discount represents an allowance applied to the complete document independent from the individual lines.

schema.title: Schema
schema.description: Schema of the referenced document if different from that of the parent.

type.title: Type
type.description:
Type of the document referenced according to the defined schema or that of the
parent document.

issue_date.title: Issue Date
issue_date.description: IssueDate reflects the date the document was issued.

series.title: Series
series.description: Series the referenced document belongs to.

code.title: Code
code.description: Source document's code or other identifier.

currency.title: Currency
currency.description: Currency used in the document, if different from the parent's currency.

lines.title: Lines
lines.description: Line index numbers inside the document, if relevant.

identities.title: Identities
identities.description: List of additional codes, IDs, or SKUs which can be used to identify the document or its contents, agreed upon by the supplier and customer.

period.title: Period
period.description: Tax period in which the referred document had an effect required by some tax regimes and formats.

reason.title: Reason
reason.description: Human readable description on why this reference is here or needs to be used.

stamps.title: Stamps
stamps.description: Seals of approval from other organizations that may need to be listed.

tax.title: Tax
tax.description:
Tax total breakdown from the original document in the provided currency. Should
only be included if required by a specific tax regime or addon.

payable.title: Payable
payable.description:
Payable is the total amount that is payable in the referenced document. Only needed
for specific tax regimes or addons. This may also be used in some scenarios
to determine the proportion of the referenced document that has been paid, and
calculate the remaining amount due and taxes.

ext.title: Extensions
ext.description: Extensions for additional codes that may be required.

meta.title: Meta
meta.description: Meta contains additional information about the document.

DocumentRef.description: DocumentRef is used to describe an existing document or a specific part of it's contents.

notes.title: Notes
notes.description: Other details to take into account for the due date.

amount.title: Amount
amount.description: How much needs to be paid by the date.

percent.title: Percent
percent.description: Percentage of the total that should be paid by the date.

currency.title: Currency
currency.description: If different from the parent document's base currency.

DueDate.description: DueDate contains an amount that should be paid by the given date.

Email.description: Email describes the electronic mailing details.

from.title: From
from.description: Currency code this will be converted from.

to.title: To
to.description: Currency code this exchange rate will convert into.

at.title: At
at.description:
At represents the effective date and time at which the exchange rate
is determined by the source. The time may be zero if referring to a
specific day only.

source.title: Source
source.description:
Source key provides a reference to the source the exchange rate was
obtained from. Typically this will be determined by an application
used to update exchange rates automatically.

amount.title: Amount
amount.description: How much is 1 of the "from" currency worth in the "to" currency.

ExchangeRate.description: ExchangeRate contains data on the rate to be used when converting amounts from one currency into another.

Extensions.description: Extensions is a map of extension keys to values.

oneOf.title: Saint Helena, Ascension and Tristan da Cunha
South Georgia and the South Sandwich Islands

label.title: Label
label.description: Optional label useful for non-standard identities to give a bit more context.

scope.title: Scope
scope.description: Scope defines the context in which this identity is meant to be used.

country.title: Country
country.description: Country from which the identity was issued.

key.title: Key
key.description: Uniquely classify this identity using a key instead of a Type.

type.title: Type
type.description:
The type of Code being represented and usually specific for
a particular context, country, or tax regime, and cannot be used
alongside the key.

code.title: Code
code.description: The actual value of the identity code.

description.title: Description
description.description: Description adds details about what the code could mean or imply

ext.title: Extensions
ext.description: Ext provides a way to add additional information to the identity.

Identity.description: Identity is used to define a code for a specific context.

label.title: Label
label.description: Label to help identify the image.

data.title: Data
data.description:
As an alternative to the URL and only when the source data is small,
like an SVG, the raw data may be provided using Base64 encoding.

description.title: Description
description.description: Details of what the image represents.

alt.title: Alt
alt.description: Alternative text if the image cannot be shown.

height.title: Height
height.description: Height of the image in pixels.

width.title: Width
width.description: Width of the image in pixels.

digest.title: Digest
digest.description:
Digest can be used to ensure the image contained at the URL
is the same one as originally intended.

meta.title: Meta
meta.description: Meta contains additional information about the image.

Image.description: Image describes a logo or photo that represents an entity.

key.title: Key
key.description:
Type of inbox being defined if required for clarification between multiple
inboxes.

scheme.title: Scheme
scheme.description:
Scheme ID of the code used to identify the inbox. This is context specific
and usually an ISO 6523 code or CEF (Connecting Europe Facility) code.

code.title: Code
code.description: Code or ID that identifies the Inbox. Mutually exclusive with URL and Email.

url.title: URL
url.description:
URL of the inbox that includes the protocol, server, and path. May
be used instead of the Code to identify the inbox. Mutually exclusive with
Code and Email.

email.title: Email
email.description: Email address for the inbox. Mutually exclusive with Code and URL.

Inbox.description: Inbox is used to store data about a connection with a service that is responsible for automatically receiving copies of GOBL envelopes or other document formats.

anyOf.title: Any
anyOf.description: Any method available, no preference.

anyOf.title: Card
anyOf.description: Payment card.

anyOf.title: Credit Transfer
anyOf.description: Sender initiated bank or wire transfer.

anyOf.title: SEPA Credit Transfer
anyOf.description: Sender initiated bank or wire transfer via SEPA.

anyOf.title: Debit Transfer
anyOf.description: Receiver initiated bank or wire transfer.

anyOf.title: Cash
anyOf.description: Cash in hand.

anyOf.title: Cheque
anyOf.description: Cheque from bank.

anyOf.title: Draft
anyOf.description: Bankers Draft or Bank Cheque.

anyOf.title: Direct Debit
anyOf.description: Direct debit from the customers bank account.

anyOf.title: SEPA Direct Debit
anyOf.description: Direct debit from the customers bank account via SEPA.

anyOf.title: Online
anyOf.description: Online or web payment.

anyOf.title: Promissory Note
anyOf.description: Promissory note contract.

anyOf.title: Netting
anyOf.description: Intercompany clearing or clearing between partners.

anyOf.title: Other
anyOf.description: Other or mutually defined means of payment.

key.title: Key
key.description: The payment means expected or that have been arranged to be used to make the payment.

detail.title: Detail
detail.description: Optional text description of the payment method

ref.title: Reference
ref.description: Remittance information or concept, a code value used to link the payment with the invoice.

credit_transfer.title: Credit Transfer
credit_transfer.description: Instructions for sending payment via a bank transfer.

card.title: Card
card.description: Details of the payment that will be made via a credit or debit card.

direct_debit.title: Direct Debit
direct_debit.description: A group of terms that can be used by the customer or payer to consolidate direct debit payments.

notes.title: Notes
notes.description: Any additional instructions that may be required to make the payment.

ext.title: Extensions
ext.description: Extension key-pairs values defined by a tax regime.

meta.title: Meta
meta.description: Non-structured additional data that may be useful.

Instructions.description: Instructions determine how the payment has or should be made.

$regime.title: Tax Regime
$regime.description:
Country code that identifies the tax regime applicable to the document.
It determines which country-specific tax rules, normalizations, and validations are applied.
It may be determined automatically via normalization of a supplier or issuer tax identity
country code.

$addons.title: Addons
$addons.description:
Addons defines a list of keys used to identify tax addons that apply special
normalization, scenarios, and validation rules to a document.

$tags.title: Tags
$tags.description:
Tags are used to help identify specific tax scenarios or requirements that may
apply changes to the contents of the document or imply a specific meaning.
Converters may use tags to help identify specific situations that do not have
a specific extension, for example; self-billed or partial invoices may be
identified by their respective tags.

oneOf.title: Standard
oneOf.description: A regular commercial invoice document between a supplier and customer.

oneOf.title: Proforma
oneOf.description: For a clients validation before sending a final invoice.

oneOf.title: Corrective
oneOf.description: Corrected invoice that completely *replaces* the preceding document.

oneOf.title: Credit Note
oneOf.description:
Reflects a refund either partial or complete of the preceding document. A 
credit note effectively *extends* the previous document.

oneOf.title: Debit Note
oneOf.description: An additional set of charges to be added to the preceding document.

oneOf.title: Other
oneOf.description:
Any other type of invoice that does not fit into the standard categories and implies
that any scenarios defined in tax regimes or addons will not be applied.

This is useful for being able to create invoices with custom types in extensions,
but is not recommend for general use.

type.title: Type
type.description: Type of invoice document. May be restricted by local tax regime requirements.

series.title: Series
series.description:
Series is used to identify groups of invoices by date, business area, project,
type of document, customer type, a combination of any or other company specific data.
If the output format does not support the series as a separate field, it will be
prepended to the code for presentation with a dash (`-`) for separation.

code.title: Code
code.description:
Code is a sequential identifier that uniquely identifies the invoice. The code can
be left empty initially, but is **required** to **sign** the invoice.

issue_date.title: Issue Date
issue_date.description:
Issue date for when the invoice was created and issued. Todays date is used if
none is set. There are often legal restrictions on how far back or in the future an
invoice can be issued.

issue_time.title: Issue Time
issue_time.description:
IssueTime is an optional field that may be useful to indicate the time of day when
the invoice was issued. Some regions and formats may require this field to be set.
An empty string will be automatically updated to reflect the current time, otherwise
the field can be left with a nil value.

op_date.title: Operation Date
op_date.description: Date when the operation defined by the invoice became effective.

value_date.title: Value Date
value_date.description: When the taxes of this invoice become accountable, if none set, the issue date is used.

currency.title: Currency
currency.description: Currency for all invoice amounts and totals, unless explicitly stated otherwise.

exchange_rates.title: Exchange Rates
exchange_rates.description: Exchange rates to be used when converting the invoices monetary values into other currencies.

preceding.title: Preceding Details
preceding.description: Document references for previous invoices that this document replaces or extends.

supplier.title: Supplier
supplier.description: The entity supplying the goods or services and usually responsible for paying taxes.

customer.title: Customer
customer.description:
Legal entity receiving the goods or services, may be nil in certain circumstances
such as simplified invoices.

lines.title: Lines
lines.description: List of invoice lines representing each of the items sold to the customer.

discounts.title: Discounts
discounts.description: Discounts or allowances applied to the complete invoice

charges.title: Charges
charges.description: Charges or surcharges applied to the complete invoice

ordering.title: Ordering Details
ordering.description: Ordering details including document references and buyer or seller parties.

payment.title: Payment Details
payment.description: Information on when, how, and to whom the invoice should be paid.

delivery.title: Delivery Details
delivery.description: Specific details on delivery of the goods referenced in the invoice.

totals.title: Totals
totals.description: Summary of all the invoice totals, including taxes (calculated).

notes.title: Notes
notes.description:
Unstructured information that is relevant to the invoice, such as correction or additional
legal details.

complements.title: Complements
complements.description: Additional complementary objects that add relevant information to the invoice.

meta.title: Meta
meta.description: Additional semi-structured data that doesn't fit into the body of the invoice.

attachments.title: Attachments
attachments.description:
Attachments provide additional information or supporting documents that are not included
in the main document. It is important that attachments are not used for alternative
versions of the PDF, for that, see "links" inside the envelope headers.

Invoice.description: Invoice represents a payment claim for goods or services supplied under conditions agreed between the supplier and the customer.

ref.title: Ref
ref.description:
Primary reference code that identifies this item.
Additional codes can be provided in the 'identities' property.

key.title: Key
key.description: Special key used to classify the item sometimes required by some regimes.

identities.title: Identities
identities.description: List of additional codes, IDs, or SKUs which can be used to identify the item. They should be agreed upon between supplier and customer.

currency.title: Currency
currency.description: Currency used for the item's price.

price.title: Price
price.description: Base price of a single unit to be sold. Must be either zero or positive.

alt_prices.title: Alternative Prices
alt_prices.description:
AltPrices defines a list of prices with their currencies that may be used
as an alternative to the item's base price.

origin.title: Country of Origin
origin.description: Country code of where this item was from originally.

ext.title: Extensions
ext.description: Extension code map for any additional regime specific codes that may be required.

meta.title: Meta
meta.description: Additional meta information that may be useful

Item.description: Item is used to describe a single product or service.

Key.title: Key
Key.description: Text identifier to be used instead of a code for a more verbose but readable identifier.

identifier.title: Identifier
identifier.description:
Single identifier provided by the supplier for an object on which the
line item is based and is not considered a universal identity. Examples
include a subscription number, telephone number, meter point, etc.
Utilize the label property to provide a description of the identifier.

period.title: Period
period.description: A period of time relevant to when the service or item is delivered.

order.title: Order Reference
order.description: Order reference for a specific line within a purchase order provided by the buyer.

cost.title: Cost Reference
cost.description: Buyer accounting reference cost code to associate with the line.

item.title: Item
item.description: Details about the item, service or good, that is being sold

breakdown.title: Breakdown
breakdown.description:
Breakdown of the line item for more detailed information. The sum of all lines
will be used for the item price.

sum.title: Sum
sum.description: Result of quantity multiplied by the item's price (calculated)

taxes.title: Taxes
taxes.description: Map of taxes to be applied and used in the invoice totals

total.title: Total
total.description: Total line amount after applying discounts to the sum (calculated).

substituted.title: Substituted
substituted.description:
List of substituted lines. Useful for deliveries or corrective documents in order
to indicate to the recipient which of the requested lines are being replaced.
This is for purely informative purposes, and will not be used for calculations.

seller.title: Seller
seller.description:
Seller of the item if different from the supplier or ordering seller. This can be
useful for marketplace or drop-ship scenarios in locations that require the
original seller to be indicated.

notes.title: Notes
notes.description:
Set of specific notes for this line that may be required for
clarification.

ext.title: Extensions
ext.description: Extension codes that apply to the line

Line.description: Line is a single row in an invoice.

key.title: Key
key.description:
Key for grouping or identifying charges for tax purposes. A suggested list of
keys is provided, but these are for reference only and may be extended by
the issuer.

code.title: Code
code.description: Reference or ID for this charge defined by the issuer

reason.title: Reason
reason.description: Text description as to why the charge was applied

base.title: Base
base.description: Base for percent calculations instead of the line's sum

percent.title: Percent
percent.description: Percentage of base or parent line's sum

quantity.title: Quantity
quantity.description:
Quantity of units to apply the charge to when using the rate instead of
the line's quantity.

unit.title: Unit
unit.description: Unit to associate with the quantity when using the rate.

rate.title: Rate
rate.description: Rate defines a price per unit to use instead of the percentage.

amount.title: Amount
amount.description: Fixed or resulting charge amount to apply (calculated if percent present).

ext.title: Extensions
ext.description: Extension codes that apply to the charge

LineCharge.description: LineCharge represents an amount added to the line, and will be applied before taxes.

anyOf.title: Bonus for works ahead of schedule

key.title: Key
key.description: Key for identifying the type of discount being applied.

code.title: Code
code.description: Code or reference for this discount defined by the issuer

reason.title: Reason
reason.description: Text description as to why the discount was applied

base.title: Base
base.description: Base for percent calculations instead of the line's sum.

percent.title: Percent
percent.description: Percentage to apply to the base or line sum to calculate the discount amount

amount.title: Amount
amount.description: Fixed discount amount to apply (calculated if percent present)

ext.title: Extensions
ext.description: Extension codes that apply to the discount

LineDiscount.description: LineDiscount represents an amount deducted from the line, and will be applied before taxes.

Meta.description: Meta defines a structure for data about the data being defined.

alias.title: Alias
alias.description: What the person would like to be called

prefix.title: Prefix
prefix.description: Additional prefix to add to name, like Mrs. or Mr.

suffix.title: Suffix
suffix.description: Titles to include after the name.

Name.description: Name represents what a human is called.

oneOf.title: Reason
oneOf.description: Explanation of something relevant to the document

key.title: Key
key.description: Key specifying subject of the text

code.title: Code
code.description: Code used for additional data that may be required to identify the note.

src.title: Source
src.description: Source of this note, especially useful when auto-generated.

Note.description: Note represents a free text of additional information that may be added to a document.

Object.title: Object
Object.description: Data object whose type is determined from the $schema property.

key.title: Key
key.description: Key identifier for this online payment method.

label.title: Label
label.description: Descriptive label for the online provider.

url.title: URL
url.description: URL to be used for payment.

Online.description: Online provides the details required to make a payment online using a website

code.title: Code
code.description: Identifier assigned by the customer or buyer for internal routing purposes.

identities.title: Identities
identities.description:
Any additional Codes, IDs, SKUs, or other regional or custom
identifiers that may be used to identify the order.

cost.title: Cost
cost.description: Buyer accounting reference cost code associated with the document.

period.title: Period
period.description:
Period of time that the invoice document refers to often used in addition to the details
provided in the individual line items.

buyer.title: Buyer
buyer.description: Party who is responsible for issuing payment, if not the same as the customer.

seller.title: Seller
seller.description: Seller is the party liable to pay taxes on the transaction if not the same as the supplier.

issuer.title: Issuer
issuer.description:
Issuer represents a third party responsible for issuing the invoice, but is not
responsible for tax. Some tax regimes and formats require this field.

purchases.title: Purchase Orders
purchases.description: Purchase orders issued by the customer or buyer.

sales.title: Sales Orders
sales.description: Sales orders issued by the supplier or seller.

tender.title: Tender Advice
tender.description: Tender advice, the identification of the call for tender or lot the invoice relates to.

Ordering.description: Ordering provides additional information about the ordering process including references to other documents and alternative parties involved in the order-to-delivery process.

$regime.title: Tax Regime
$regime.description:
Country code that identifies the tax regime applicable to the document.
It determines which country-specific tax rules, normalizations, and validations are applied.
It may be determined automatically via normalization of a supplier or issuer tax identity
country code.

label.title: Label
label.description:
Label can be used to provide a custom label for the party in a given
context in a single language, for example "Supplier", "Host", or similar.

name.title: Name
name.description: Legal name or representation of the organization.

tax_id.title: Tax Identity
tax_id.description: The entity's legal ID code used for tax purposes. They may have other numbers, but we're only interested in those valid for tax purposes.

identities.title: Identities
identities.description: Set of codes used to identify the party in other systems.

people.title: People
people.description: Details of physical people who represent the party.

inboxes.title: Inboxes
inboxes.description: Digital inboxes used for forwarding electronic versions of documents

addresses.title: Postal Addresses
addresses.description: Regular post addresses for where information should be sent if needed.

websites.title: Websites
websites.description: Public websites that provide further information about the party.

registration.title: Registration
registration.description: Additional registration details about the company that may need to be included in a document.

logos.title: Logos
logos.description: Images that can be used to identify the party visually.

ext.title: Extensions
ext.description: Extension code map for any additional regime specific codes that may be required.

meta.title: Meta
meta.description: Any additional semi-structured information that does not fit into the rest of the party.

Party.description: Party represents a person or business entity.

payee.title: Payee
payee.description: The party responsible for receiving payment of the invoice, if not the supplier.

advances.title: Advances
advances.description: Any amounts that have been paid in advance and should be deducted from the amount due.

instructions.title: Instructions
instructions.description: Details on how payment should be made.

PaymentDetails.description: PaymentDetails contains details as to how the invoice should be paid.

Percentage.title: Percentage
Percentage.description: Similar to an Amount, but designed for percentages and includes % symbol in JSON output.

label.title: Label
label.description: Label is a short description of the period.

start.title: Start
start.description: Start indicates when this period starts.

end.title: End
end.description: End indicates when the period ends, and must be after the start date.

Period.description: Period represents two dates with a start and finish.

label.title: Label
label.description:
Label can be used to identify the person in a given context in a single
language, for example "Attn", "Contact", "Responsible", etc.

key.title: Key
key.description: Key used to identify the role of the person inside the context of the object.

name.title: Name
name.description: Complete details on the name of the person.

role.title: Role
role.description: Role or job title of the responsibilities of the person within an organization.

identities.title: Identities
identities.description:
Set of codes used to identify the person, such as ID numbers, social security,
driving licenses, etc. that can be attributed to the individual.

addresses.title: Postal Addresses
addresses.description: Regular post addresses for where information should be sent if needed.

emails.title: Email Addresses
emails.description: Electronic mail addresses that belong to the person.

avatars.title: Avatars
avatars.description: Avatars provider links to images or photos or the person.

Person.description: Person represents a human, and how to contact them electronically.

country.title: Country
country.description:
Country code override when issuing with taxes applied from different countries,
it'd be very strange to mix rates from different countries, but in theory
this would be possible.

key.title: Key
key.description: Tax key if supported by the category.

ext.title: Extensions
ext.description: If the rate is defined with extensions, they'll be used to group by also.

base.title: Base
base.description: Base amount that the percentage is applied to.

percent.title: Percent
percent.description: Percentage of the rate. Will be nil when taxes are **exempt**.

amount.title: Amount
amount.description: Total amount of rate, excluding surcharges

RateTotal.description: RateTotal contains a sum of all the tax rates in the document with a matching category and rate.

RateTotalSurcharge.description: RateTotalSurcharge reflects the sum surcharges inside the rate.

Registration.description: Registration is used in countries that require additional information to be associated with a company usually related to a specific registration office.

Set.description: Set defines a list of tax categories and their rates to be used alongside taxable items.

prv.title: Provider
prv.description: Identity of the agency used to create the stamp usually defined by each region.

val.title: Value
val.description: The serialized stamp value generated for or by the external agency

Stamp.description: Stamp defines an official seal of approval from a third party like a governmental agency or intermediary and should thus be included in any official envelopes.

identifier.title: Identifier
identifier.description:
Single identifier provided by the supplier for an object on which the
line item is based and is not considered a universal identity. Examples
include a subscription number, telephone number, meter point, etc.
Utilize the label property to provide a description of the identifier.

period.title: Period
period.description: A period of time relevant to when the service or item is delivered.

order.title: Order Reference
order.description: Order reference for a specific line within a purchase order provided by the buyer.

cost.title: Cost Reference
cost.description: Buyer accounting reference cost code to associate with the line.

item.title: Item
item.description: Details about the item, service or good, that is being sold

sum.title: Sum
sum.description: Result of quantity multiplied by the item's price (calculated)

total.title: Total
total.description: Total sub-line amount after applying discounts to the sum (calculated).

notes.title: Notes
notes.description:
Set of specific notes for this sub-line that may be required for
clarification.

SubLine.description: SubLine provides a simplified line that can be embedded inside other lines to provide a more detailed breakdown of the items being sold or substituted.

prices_include.title: Prices Include
prices_include.description:
Category of the tax already included in the line item prices, especially
useful for B2C retailers with customers who prefer final prices inclusive of
tax.

oneOf.title: Precise
oneOf.description:
The default method of calculating the totals in GOBL, and provides the best results
for most cases as the precision is maintained to the maximum amount possible. The
tradeoff however is that sometimes the totals may not sum exactly based on what is visible.

oneOf.title: Currency
oneOf.description:
The alternative method of calculating the totals that will first round all the amounts
to the currency's precision before making the sums. Totals using this approach can always
be recalculated using the amounts presented, but can lead to rounding errors in the case
of pre-payments and when line item prices include tax.

rounding.title: Rounding Model
rounding.description:
Rounding model used to perform tax calculations on the invoice. This
will be configured automatically based on the tax regime, or
`sum-then-round` by default, but you can override here if needed.
Use with caution, as some conversion tools may make assumptions about
the rounding model used.

ext.title: Extensions
ext.description:
Additional extensions that are applied to the invoice as a whole as opposed to specific
sections.

meta.title: Meta
meta.description:
Any additional data that may be required for processing, but should never
be relied upon by recipients.

Tax.description: Tax defines a summary of the taxes which may be applied to an invoice.

oneOf.title: Saint Helena, Ascension and Tristan da Cunha
South Georgia and the South Sandwich Islands

TaxCountryCode.title: Tax Country Code
TaxCountryCode.description: Defines an ISO base country code used for tax purposes

num.title: Number
num.description: Free-text string that represents the telephone number.

Telephone.description: Telephone describes what is expected for a telephone number.

oneOf.title: Deferred
oneOf.description: Deferred until after the due date

oneOf.title: Pending
oneOf.description: Seller to advise buyer in separate transaction

key.title: Key
key.description: Type of terms to be applied.

due_dates.title: Due Dates
due_dates.description: Set of dates for agreed payments.

notes.title: Notes
notes.description: Description of the conditions for payment.

ext.title: Extensions
ext.description: Extensions to the terms for local codes.

Terms.description: Terms defines when we expect the customer to pay, or have paid, for the contents of the document.

Time.title: Time
Time.description: Civil time in simplified ISO format, like 13:45:30

categories.title: Categories
categories.description: Grouping of all the taxes by their category

sum.title: Sum
sum.description: Total value of all non-retained or indirect taxes.

retained.title: Retained
retained.description: Sum of retained or withheld tax amounts

Total.description: Total contains a set of Category Totals which in turn contain all the accumulated taxes contained in the document.

sum.title: Sum
sum.description: Total of all line item amounts.

discount.title: Discount
discount.description: Total of all discounts applied at the document level.

charge.title: Charge
charge.description: Total of all charges applied at the document level.

tax_included.title: Tax Included
tax_included.description: Total tax amount included in the prices, if prices are tax-inclusive.

total.title: Total
total.description: Net total amount after subtracting discounts and adding charges, excluding tax.

taxes.title: Tax Totals
taxes.description: Detailed breakdown of all taxes applied to the invoice.

tax.title: Tax
tax.description: Total indirect tax amount to be applied to the invoice.

total_with_tax.title: Total with Tax
total_with_tax.description: Final total amount after applying indirect taxes.

retained_tax.title: Retained Tax
retained_tax.description: Total tax amount retained or withheld by the customer to be paid to the tax authority.

rounding.title: Rounding
rounding.description: Adjustment amount applied to the invoice totals to meet rounding rules or expectations.

payable.title: Payable
payable.description: Final amount to be paid after retained taxes and rounding adjustments.

advance.title: Advance
advance.description: Total amount already paid in advance by the customer.

due.title: Due
due.description: Remaining amount that needs to be paid.

Totals.description: Totals contains the summaries of all calculations for the invoice.

oneOf.title: Decimetres
oneOf.description: A unit of length equal to one-tenth of a metre.

oneOf.title: Acres
oneOf.description: A unit of area equal to 43,560 square feet.

oneOf.title: Hectares
oneOf.description: A unit of area equal to 10,000 square metres.

oneOf.title: Rate
oneOf.description: A unit of quantity expressed as a rate for usage of a facility or service.

oneOf.title: Months
oneOf.description: Unit of time equal to 1/12 of a year of 365,25 days.

oneOf.title: Pieces
oneOf.description: A unit of count defining the number of pieces (piece: a single item, article or exemplar).

oneOf.title: Items
oneOf.description: A unit of count defining the number of items regarded as separate units.

oneOf.title: Pairs
oneOf.description: A unit of count defining the number of pairs (pair: item described by two's).

oneOf.title: Dozens
oneOf.description: A unit of count defining the number of units in multiples of 12.

oneOf.title: Assortments
oneOf.description: A unit of count defining the number of assortments (assortment: a collection of items or components of a single product packaged together).

oneOf.title: Service Units
oneOf.description: A unit of count defining the number of service units (service unit: defined period / property / facility / utility of supply).

oneOf.title: Jobs
oneOf.description: A unit of count defining the number of jobs.

oneOf.title: Activities
oneOf.description: A unit of count defining the number of activities (activity: a unit of work or action).

oneOf.title: Trips
oneOf.description: A unit of count defining the number of trips (trip: a journey to a place and back again).

oneOf.title: Groups
oneOf.description: A unit of count defining the number of groups (group: set of items classified together).

oneOf.title: Outfits
oneOf.description: A unit of count defining the number of outfits (outfit: a complete set of equipment / materials / objects used for a specific purpose).

oneOf.title: Kits
oneOf.description: A unit of count defining the number of kits (kit: tub, barrel or pail).

oneOf.title: Base Boxes
oneOf.description: A unit of area of 112 sheets of tin mil products (tin plate, tin free steel or black plate) 14 by 20 inches, or 31,360 square inches.

oneOf.title: Bulk Packs
oneOf.description: A unit of count defining the number of items per bulk pack.

oneOf.title: One
oneOf.description: A single generic unit of a service or product.

oneOf.title: Sets
oneOf.description: A unit of count defining the number of sets (set: a number of objects grouped together).

oneOf.title: Unit
oneOf.description: A type of package composed of a single item or object, not otherwise specified as a unit of transport equipment.
UN/ECE Unit Code from Recommendations 20 and 21

Unit.title: Unit
Unit.description: Unit defines how the quantity of the product should be interpreted either using a GOBL lower-case key (e.g. 'kg'), or UN/ECE code upper-case code (e.g. 'KGM').

label.title: Label
label.description: Label for the website to show alongside the URL.

title.title: Title
title.description: Title of the website to help distinguish between this and other links.

Website.description: Website describes what is expected for a web address.
